## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] fix
- [ ] feature
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] breaking change

## Deployment impact

- [ ] no runtime impact
- [ ] restart required
- [ ] configuration changes required (`.env`)
- [ ] potential downtime risk

## Validation

- [ ] `bash -n entrypoint.sh`
- [ ] `bash -n healthcheck.sh`
- [ ] `bash scripts/preflight-env.sh .env.example`
- [ ] manual local smoke test (if Docker available)

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if needed)
- [ ] docs updated (if needed)
- [ ] release notes impact considered
